data.title: Coinbase Unlocks DeFi Opportunities for XRP and Dogecoin Holders on Base
data.description:
• Coinbase has listed wrapped versions of XRP and dogecoin (DOGE) on its layer-2 platform, Base, enabling DeFi opportunities.
  • The cbXRP and cbDOGE tokens are backed 1:1 by native coins, allowing seamless transfer within the Base ecosystem.
  • The market cap for wrapped XRP reached over $5 million in 24 hours, while wrapped dogecoin is nearing $2 million.

data.title: XRP Drops 3% as Selling Pressure Overwhelms Support Level
data.description:
• XRP fell 2.71% in the last 24 hours, trading at $2.20 as selling pressure increased.
  • The token's market cap dropped by $6 billion, with weekly losses reaching 9.11% amid global market volatility.
  • Ripple is focusing on integrating with traditional finance, highlighted by its new stablecoin RLUSD and acquisition of Hidden Road.

data.title: Dogecoin Struggles to Reclaim $0.19 Threshold as Bearish Sentiment Persists
data.description:
• Dogecoin fell 4.3% in the last 24 hours, breaking key support and establishing a new resistance zone.
  • Recent whale transfers and macroeconomic factors like geopolitical tensions and inflation are influencing DOGE's market performance.
  • Technical analysis shows DOGE consolidating between $0.188 and $0.190, with weak recovery attempts amid broader market caution.

data.title: WazirX's Restructuring Plan Declined By Singapore Court, Hacked Indian Exchange Says
data.description:
• The Singapore High Court has declined to approve WazirX's restructuring plan, delaying creditor repayments.
  • WazirX's plan, initially approved in January, included launching a decentralized exchange and issuing recovery tokens.
  • If the restructuring fails, WazirX could face liquidation, potentially resulting in lower compensation for creditors.

data.title: Profit-Taking Continues in Crypto Market as Dogecoin, Cardano's ADA Lead Majors Slide
data.description:
• Profit-taking pressures continue to affect crypto markets, with Dogecoin and Cardano leading declines.
  • Bitcoin remains stable, while Tron is the only major token showing gains.
  • Market sentiment is in the greed zone, but analysts predict potential upward movement for Bitcoin.

data.title: Asia Morning Briefing: Vitalik's Plan Can Bring ETH to $3,000 and Crypto 'More Popular' Than Stocks in Korea
data.description:
• Ethereum's potential to surpass $3,000 hinges on Vitalik Buterin's plan to enhance Layer 1 scalability, reducing reliance on Layer 2 solutions.
  • South Korea's new administration is expected to support crypto and stablecoin policies, with a focus on leveraging the country's strengths in AI and digital finance.

data.title: Circle Debuts on NYSE at $31 Per Share, Valuing Stablecoin Issuer at $6.2 Billion
data.description:
• Circle began trading on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker CRCL at $31 per share, above its expected price range.
  • The stablecoin issuer raised $1.1 billion in its IPO, giving the company a valuation of $6.2 billion.
  • This marks the second crypto company to go public during the Trump administration.

data.title: Trio of Soft Economic Reports Boost Fed Rate Cut Odds, but What About Bitcoin?
data.description:
• Three soft U.S. economic reports Wednesday sent interest rates tumbling.
  • The Fed's own Beige Book noted a deteriorating outlook in a few of its surveyed districts.
  • A weak government jobs report on Friday might have markets anticipating one or more Fed rate cuts this summer, turning interest rates from a headwind to tailwind for bitcoin prices.

data.title: JPMorgan to Accept Bitcoin ETFs as Loan Collateral in Expansion of Crypto Access: Bloomberg
data.description:
• JPMorgan will begin accepting shares of BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) as collateral for loans.
  • The bank will consider some clients’ crypto holdings when calculating their net worth and liquid assets.
  • With political and investor pressure mounting, JPMorgan and other banks are moving to accommodate crypto assets.

data.title: Standard Chartered-Backed Zodia Custody Starts Safekeeping Tokenized Emeralds
data.description:
• The EmGemX token is a way for institutional investors to receive fractional ownership in a diversified portfolio of high-quality emeralds.
  • Physical emeralds, stored in special vaults, which have seen an average annual appreciation of around 9%.
